title.en: Determining whether a trainee should start an EMR procedure

statement.en: ESGE recommends that the criteria given in the following list should be considered when determining when/if EMR procedures should be started by a trainee.

text.en: From the outset, certain lesions are unsuitable for hands-on training and this should be recognized by the supervising practitioner (e. g. complex location, very large lesions, previously attempted lesions, unstable or very co-morbid patient).
Prior knowledge of the SMSA and SMSA+ scores (Table 2) of the target lesion for EMR can be useful to predict the possibilities for training.
A trainee in EMR should not be paired with a nursing or other colleague training in assisting at EMR.
